Bus Timings

Bus C4 Schedule Gold Souq Bus Station to Jaddaf, Government Workshop

May 30, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Hey, have you heard about Bus C4? It’s a real MVP in Dubai’s transport game. This route’s got you covered from Gold Souq Bus Station all the way to Jaddaf, Government Workshop. Whether you’re a local doing the daily grind or a tourist trying to see the sights, this bus is your best buddy.

The cool thing is, it’s super dependable. You won’t be left twiddling your thumbs waiting for ages. They’ve got this smart schedule that pretty much works for everyone, no matter when you need to hop on. Seriously, if you’re trying to get around Dubai without the usual headaches, Bus C4 is your ticket to ride.

Route Name C4
Route Description Gold Souq Bus Station · 25 - Jaddaf, Government Workshop
Total Distance Approximately 10.4 to 15.6 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 31 minutes
Operational Hours 05:40 to 23:10 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus C4 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus C4 operates with a regular schedule throughout the day. The timings for the bus are as follows:

From Gold Souq Bus Station From Jaddaf, Government Workshop
05:40 06:00
06:00 06:50
06:25 07:20
06:45 07:45
07:10 08:05
07:35 08:35
08:05 09:05
08:35 09:30
09:00 10:00
09:25 10:30
09:55 10:55
10:25 11:25
10:50 11:55
11:20 12:25
11:50 12:55
12:15 13:45
12:50 14:25
13:30 15:05
14:15 15:50
15:00 16:30
15:30 17:00
15:55 17:30
16:25 18:05
16:55 18:35
17:30 19:10
18:05 19:50
18:40 20:20
19:15 20:50
19:50 21:20
20:20 21:50
20:50 22:15
21:20 22:45
21:50 23:10
23:05  

Bus C4 Timetable

The complete timings can be found on the RTA website, or click here for Bus C4 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus C4 is AED 3. This pricing provides a cost-effective means of traveling across the entire route, making it a practical choice for daily commuters as well as occasional travelers. The affordable fare ensures that passengers receive good value for their money while benefiting from the convenience and quality of the bus service.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus C4 does not offer online booking options. For real-time updates and to plan your journey effectively, you may use the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) app or visit their website for additional information.

Bus Route

Bus C4 covers a diverse range of stops, ensuring it serves several important districts and landmarks within Dubai. Here is the complete route:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 25

  2. Naif, Intersection

  3. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  4. Nakhal

  5. Union Metro · 1

  6. Etisalat Head Office

  7. Maktoum Road

  8. Clock Tower Roundabout

  9. Oud Metha Metro · 1

  10. Oud Metha Road

  11. Oud Metha Road, 2

  12. Wafi City

  13. Police Officers Club

  14. Belhasa Driving Center

  15. Al Jaddaf, Binghatti Avenue

  16. Wasl Club

  17. Latifa Hospital

  18. Police Officers Club

  19. Cricket Stadium

  1. Dubai Municipality Officers Recreation Club

  2. Dubai Municipality Nursery

  3. Wharf Tower 4

  4. Al Jaddaf, Culture Village

  5. Al Jaddaf, Palazzo

  6. Mohammed bin Rashid Library

  7. Creek Metro

  8. Al Jaddaf Marine

  9. Jaddaf

  10. Jaddaf, Government Workshop

Bus C4 Station Overview

Gold Souq Bus Station · 25

Gold Souq Bus Station · 25 is a bustling transit hub located in the heart of Dubai’s historic Gold Souq area. This station serves as a vital connection point for residents and visitors exploring the vibrant souq and its surrounding attractions.

Equipped with modern amenities, including sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates, the station ensures a comfortable and efficient travel experience. Its central location near the Gold Souq makes it an essential stop for those accessing the shopping district and nearby landmarks.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Burj Nahar Intersection

This central location offers seamless connections between these diverse routes, making it a crucial point for passengers traveling throughout Dubai. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, providing a convenient

Belhasa Driving Center Bus Stop Intersection

The Belhasa Driving Center Bus Stop serves as a key intersection for Bus Route 44 and Bus Route C4. This location provides essential connectivity between these routes, facilitating efficient travel for passengers in the area. With its strategic position, the bus stop offers convenient transfer options and access to various destinations, making it an important hub for daily commutes and travel needs.

Jaddaf, Government Workshop

Jaddaf, Government Workshop is a key bus station situated in the Al Jaddaf area, providing essential transit services to the local community.

Its proximity to government offices and workshops in the Jaddaf area ensures convenient access for both employees and visitors. The station plays a crucial role in facilitating transportation to and from the administrative and industrial zones, making it an important part of the local transit network.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus C4 passes several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai:

  1. Wafi City - A prominent shopping and entertainment complex with a distinctive Egyptian theme. It offers a range of retail stores, dining options, and cultural experiences.

  2. Latifa Hospital - While primarily a healthcare facility, it is located in a significant area that offers insights into Dubai’s advanced medical services.

  3. Mohammed bin Rashid Library - A major cultural and educational landmark, this modern library serves as a hub for learning and community events.

4.

  1. Dubai Municipality Nursery - Located within the cultural district, this nursery is part of the city’s educational and community development infrastructure.

  2. Al Jaddaf, Culture Village - A cultural and arts district that showcases traditional and contemporary art, providing visitors with a rich cultural experience.

7.

These attractions highlight Dubai’s blend of modernity and tradition, offering diverse experiences from shopping and dining to cultural exploration.

Journey Experience

Bus Route C4 from Gold Souq Bus Station to Jaddaf, Government Workshop takes you on a long and fascinating journey through the heart of Dubai.

As the route continues, you’ll pass through Oud Metha, a lively area with parks, schools, and cultural centers, before reaching Jaddaf, an area famous for its shipbuilding history and modern development projects. The mix of traditional and modern Dubai makes this trip both practical and culturally enriching.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Jaddaf, Government Workshop, the furthest point on the C4 bus route, starting from Gold Souq Bus Station · 25. The ride will cost between AED 57 and AED 68, providing a comfortable and efficient way to reach your destination. Whether you’re commuting or exploring, the Careem app ensures a seamless journey along the entire C4 route.

This comprehensive guide provides all the essential details needed to navigate Bus C4 effectively, ensuring a smooth and informed travel experience in Dubai. From route and timings to ticket prices and booking options, this guide covers everything you need for a hassle-free journey. Whether you are a daily commuter or a visitor exploring the city, understanding this bus route will enhance your travel convenience and efficiency. With this information, you can confidently plan your trips and enjoy seamless connectivity across Dubai.
